section.div: Microservices Starter Kotlin - Microservices Starter Project - Spring Boot, Java 21, Log4j2, TestContainer, JUnit5, Code Coverage, Checkstyle, Kotlin DSL, Postgres, Vault Secrets, Gatling Load Testing, Sonar
Presto Trino with Apache Hive Postgres metastore
Bunch of Airflow Configurations and DAGs for Kubernetes, Spark based data-pipelines. Scale inside Kubernetes using spark kubernetes master. Secure it with keycloak
Nexus Artifact deployer from grunt against snapshot and release repositories.
